title: The Commodore 64
content: I grew up in Wyoming with a Commodore 64. That beige box demanded engagement. You couldn't just use it - you had to build with it. Lines of code, keystroke by keystroke. That's where I learned that the best things are built deliberately.
ssml_content: I grew up in Wyoming with a Commodore 64. <break time="200ms"/>That beige box demanded engagement. You couldn't just use it - you had to build with it. Lines of code, keystroke by keystroke. That's where I learned that the best things are built deliberately.
teaching_point: Deliberate action leads to meaningful creation
